name: dotnet-source-reference
description: Decompile .NET assemblies and generate LLM-optimized reference documentation for customization and integration development.

commands.name: pre-classify
commands.description: Classify assemblies and prune third-party binaries

commands.name: decompile
commands.description: Decompile passing assemblies to C# source

commands.name: review-drop
commands.description: Assess relevance of decompiled assemblies and update indexes

commands.name: prune
commands.description: Delete non-retained binaries and PDB files

commands.name: detect-databases
commands.description: Detect database usage patterns and write database-context.json

commands.name: ingest-schema
commands.description: Enrich context files using schema-enrichment.json from schema plugin

commands.name: process-drop
commands.description: Orchestrate all pipeline stages for a new binary drop

agents.name: assembly-classifier
agents.description: Assess relevance of a decompiled .NET assembly

agents.name: context-distiller
agents.description: Produce LLM-optimized context documentation for an assembly

agents.name: decompile-batch
agents.description: Decompile a batch of assemblies using ilspycmd
